query:
-- First, check how many orphaned pending orders exist
SELECT COUNT(*) as orphaned_count 
FROM orders 
WHERE payment_status = 'pending' 
AND payment_intent_id IS NULL 
AND created_at < '2026-02-09 13:00:00';

-- Delete orphaned pending orders (those without payment intent and created before the fix)
DELETE FROM orders 
WHERE payment_status = 'pending' 
AND payment_intent_id IS NULL 
AND created_at < '2026-02-09 13:00:00';
